name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.21.0 - AUTO-HANDOFF BEFORE COMPACTION. New PreCompact hook (hooks/precompact-handoff.ts) fires when Claude Code is about to summarize the context window. Emits a strong system-reminder telling Claude to invoke the codi-handoff skill IMMEDIATELY before the conversation context is lost to summarization. Closes the gap where Protocol 9 closure-detection misses compaction events that fire without explicit user closure phrases ('bye', 'wrap up', etc.) — the most common case for long working sessions. Carries forward v4.20.0 named-person-claim-grounding gate + v4.19 concise mode + v4.18 task-first persona routing.
_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example — Anand authorship attribution is legitimate
